questionHtml:
The hormones insulin, glucagon, thyroxin and leptin can all affect energy storage in the body. Which hormone increases the rate of energy release and use?

A. Insulin

B. Glucagon

C. Thyroxin

D. Leptin

meta.title: The hormones insulin, glucagon, thyroxin and leptin can all affect energy storage in the body. Which hormone increases the rate of energy release and use? A. Insulin B. Glucagon C.
